rework_cycles.reason: Lifecycle simplification: remove PAUSED/STOPPED, DRAFT-only deletion to DELETED, explicit no-reorder rule, tier retirement deferred
changes: SC-1: Remove PAUSED status entirely
SC-2: Remove STOPPED status (no path — ACTIVE can't be retired)
SC-3: Add DELETED status (terminal, reachable from DRAFT only)
SC-4: US-4 deletion: DRAFT-only, no MC, no member reassessment
SC-5: Explicit no-reorder rule (serialNumber immutable)
SC-6: Tier retirement = out of scope (future epic)
SC-7: Communications = no change (MongoDB hooks)

code_changes.TierFacade.java: Rewrote deleteTier() to DRAFT-only soft-delete (DELETED status), removed STOPPED from updateTier() switch, cleaned unused imports
code_changes.TierFacadeTest.java: shouldRejectEditOnStoppedTier → shouldRejectEditOnDeletedTier, shouldDeleteDraftImmediatelyWithoutMC → shouldDeleteDraftBySettingStatusToDeleted (soft-delete), shouldCreatePendingChangeWhenDeletingActiveWithMC → shouldReturn409WhenDeletingActiveTier, shouldRejectDeleteOfBaseTierWithMembers → shouldReturn409WhenDeletingPendingApprovalTier, cleaned unused imports

rework_cycles.scope: Model classes, MakerCheckerService<T>, TierApprovalHandler, design artifacts
changes: SC-1: All date/time fields changed from Instant to Date with @JsonFormat(XXX) — matches promotion pattern
SC-2: MC rejection now reverts entity to DRAFT via ApprovableEntityHandler.postReject()
SC-3: MakerCheckerService<T> uses generic state machine with ApprovableEntityHandler registry
SC-4: TierApprovalHandler.postReject() implemented — sets tier back to DRAFT on rejection
SC-5: ProgramSlab status column, findActiveByProgram(), Flyway migration ALL removed from scope
SC-6: 01b-migrator.md M-1 and M-2 marked NOT NEEDED

rework_cycles.reason: Migration: Delete custom makerchecker/ package (17 files), adopt Baljeet's generic makechecker/ framework (ApprovableEntity, ApprovableEntityHandler, MakerCheckerService<T>)
rework_cycles.scope: All tier MC code + all pipeline artifacts (HLD, LLD, api-handoff, session-memory, tests, QA, etc.)
changes: SC-1: Delete entire makerchecker/ package (17 files: MakerCheckerService, MakerCheckerServiceImpl, MakerCheckerFacade, MakerCheckerController, TierChangeApplier, ChangeApplier, PendingChange, MakerCheckerConfig, enums, DTOs)
SC-2: UnifiedTierConfig implements ApprovableEntity (status transitions on entity)
SC-3: TierApprovalHandler implements ApprovableEntityHandler<UnifiedTierConfig> (replaces TierChangeApplier)
SC-4: TierFacade.createTier() always DRAFT (no MC toggle), add submitForApproval/handleApproval/listPendingApprovals

SC-8: All 25 pipeline artifacts updated to reflect new architecture

rework_cycles.label: Rework #6a — Contract rename + envelope flatten + program/tier reject asymmetry
rework_cycles.skipped_reason: No new screens, no new repos — Phase 3 (UI) and Phase 5 (Research) CONFIRMED unchanged
rework_cycles.reason: Contract rename (downgrade→renewal), GET envelope flatten, drop validity.startDate for SLAB_UPGRADE, compute FIXED duration, filter/reject -1 sentinels, defensive reject multi-tracker eligibility, hard flip (no back-compat), reject Class A + Class B program-level fields on per-tier write. Advanced-settings endpoint (6b) deferred for separate discussion.
rework_cycles.scope: intouch-api-v3 only (Q13). Wire layer cleanup — no engine repo changes, no Thrift IDL, no Flyway.

locked_decisions.Q1-Q2-Q4: GET envelope flattens — hoist live.* to tier root + status:LIVE + forward-compat dual-block
locked_decisions.Q3: Rename downgrade→renewal block; target→downgradeTo (UI-matching, Figma 'Downgrade to'); reevaluateOnReturn/dailyEnabled hoisted out of renewal
locked_decisions.Q5c: Defensive reject multi-tracker eligibility on per-tier wire in 6a — subsumed by Q18/Q24. Engine storage capability (AdditionalUpgradeCriteria[]) already exists; wire plumbing for it folds into 6b (FU-01 CANCELLED 2026-04-22).
locked_decisions.Q8: Compute FIXED duration from startDate + periodValue (no new field)
locked_decisions.Q9: Filter value==-1 from GET conditions; reject on write (9001-9010 range)
locked_decisions.Q11: Hard flip — no back-compat window for downgrade→renewal rename
locked_decisions.Q14: Split Rework #6 into 6a (this cycle) + 6b (advanced-settings endpoint, separate discussion)
locked_decisions.Q15: SUPERSEDED by Q23 — Thrift-via-intouch-api-v3 path abandoned in favour of api_gateway direct-to-ProgramsApi
locked_decisions.Q16: UI 'Define when to validate tier's renewal conditions' = periodType
locked_decisions.Q17: Per-tier POST/PUT rejects reevaluateOnReturn + dailyEnabled (Class A) — SUBSUMED by Q24
locked_decisions.Q18: Per-tier POST/PUT rejects kpiType, upgradeType, trackingPeriod, conditions[], expressionRelation, periodType, periodValue, retainPoints (Class B) — SUBSUMED by Q24
locked_decisions.Q20: Per-tier POST scope = Figma per-tier wizard fields only (name, description, color, eligibility.threshold, validity.periodType/Value/startDate, renewal.downgradeTo/conditions[]/criteriaType). No nested advancedSettings envelope.
locked_decisions.Q22: No nested advancedSettings block on per-tier POST/PUT — write-narrow boundary. Earlier 'advancedSettings envelope on per-tier POST' proposal explicitly rejected by user.
locked_decisions.Q23: Advanced-settings endpoint deployed via api_gateway (nginx-level) → pointsengine-emf/ProgramsApi.java directly. No intouch-api-v3 wrapping, no maker-checker, no auth/logging duplication. SUPERSEDES Q15 (Thrift-via-intouch-api-v3 path abandoned).
locked_decisions.Q24: Per-tier POST strictly REJECTS program-level fields with 400 InvalidInputException (error-code 9001-9010). Per-tier GET HOISTS program-level fields into tier root read-wide for UI pre-fill. Write-narrow / read-wide asymmetric contract. Rejected fields: kpiType, upgradeType, trackerId, trackerConditionId, additionalCriteria[], expressionRelation, reevaluateOnReturn, dailyEnabled, retainPoints, isDowngradeOnPartnerProgramExpiryEnabled. SUBSUMES Q17/Q18/Q25; SUPERSEDES Q21 (first-writer-wins no longer needed).
locked_decisions.Q26: renewal.criteriaType (NOT 'conditionsToSatisfy') — B1a lock unchanged: only 'Same as eligibility' accepted; expressionRelation + conditions must be null/empty. B2 (Custom) + B3 (engine wiring) deferred to a future follow-up. Earlier 'conditionsToSatisfy' references in session-memory are a doc typo — real wire field is criteriaType (TierRenewalConfig.java:57).

rework_cycles.fu01_status: CANCELLED 2026-04-22. Reason: AdditionalUpgradeCriteria[] in pointsengine-emf engine already supports multi-tracker (ThresholdBasedSlabUpgradeStrategyImpl.java:51,229-239). peb and pointsengine-emf are the same engine layer (user-confirmed). The silent-drop gap is purely wire plumbing in intouch-api-v3, folded into 6b.

deferred_to_6b.deployment: api_gateway (nginx) → pointsengine-emf/ProgramsApi.java direct. Bypasses intouch-api-v3 entirely. No maker-checker, no Thrift IDL.
deferred_to_6b.thrift_method: N/A — ProgramsApi writes in-process to SlabDowngradeStrategyConfiguration + SlabUpgradeStrategy.propertyValues using existing engine services.

open_questions_for_ba: Wizard Step 2 'Qualifying conditions' — Figma shows these inside per-tier Eligibility wizard, but Q20/Q22/Q24 put them program-level (advanced-settings only, rejected on per-tier POST). Under the locked asymmetric contract, the per-tier wizard should pre-fill these from advanced-settings (read-wide hoist) and the UI should either (a) hide them inside per-tier create or (b) render them read-only with a deep-link to advanced-settings. BA rework must pick the UX framing; the wire contract is locked — no per-tier override mechanism.

gap_analyser.q20_verdict: STANDS (except L-2: validity.periodType/periodValue are per-slab, not program-level)
gap_analyser.fu01_verdict: STANDS — engine supports multi-tracker via additionalUpgradeCriteriaList
medium_findings: M-1 Class A reject has no DTO surface
M-2 Class B reject has no DTO surface
M-3 advancedSettings envelope has no DTO surface

Q-OP-2_periodtype_scope_and_conditional_.decision: Option (c) — Scope lock out of 6a, with user-imposed duration caveat
Q-OP-2_periodtype_scope_and_conditional_.scope_lock: 6a handles SLAB_UPGRADE explicitly (REQ-21 startDate drop + REQ-36 reject). FIXED_CUSTOMER_REGISTRATION, FIXED_LAST_UPGRADE, SLAB_UPGRADE_CYCLIC are pass-through from Rework #5 behaviour — no new wire-level handling in 6a.
Q-OP-2_periodtype_scope_and_conditional_.user_caveat: validity.periodValue is REQUIRED when validity.periodType is FIXED-family (FIXED, FIXED_CUSTOMER_REGISTRATION, FIXED_LAST_UPGRADE). SLAB_UPGRADE-family (SLAB_UPGRADE, SLAB_UPGRADE_CYCLIC) does NOT require periodValue — engine is event-driven.

new_req.post_rule: If validity.periodType is FIXED-family on POST, validity.periodValue must be present + non-null + positive integer. Missing/null/non-positive -> 400 InvalidInputException code 9018.
new_req.put_rule: If PUT payload changes periodType INTO FIXED-family, effective post-merge state must carry periodValue. Exact merge semantics (payload-only vs payload+stored) deferred to Designer Phase 7.
new_req.rationale: Figma wizard treats duration as required on FIXED paths. Wire-level enforcement prevents FIXED tiers from being saved without durations, which would break REQ-22 computed end-date.

amended_req.change: FIXED duration read path made null-safe for legacy tiers with missing periodValue — computed end-date omitted rather than returned as null/0. Designer decides final field shape in Phase 7.

resolves_contradictions: C-12 (partial resolution — enum scope explicitly locked OUT of 6a; per-enum read behaviour for FIXED_CUSTOMER_REGISTRATION / FIXED_LAST_UPGRADE / SLAB_UPGRADE_CYCLIC deferred to future rework)

error_code_allocation_delta.9018: REQ-56 — FIXED-family periodType without required periodValue

deferred_design_questions: Phase 7 Designer: exact PUT merge semantics for conditional presence — does the validator check against the stored doc, or reject outright if payload alone can't satisfy the FIXED+periodValue constraint?
Phase 7 Designer: wire shape for legacy FIXED tiers with missing periodValue on GET — omit the computed end-date field, or return a sentinel?
